title: Iran's high-risk war strategy seems to centre on endurance and deterrence
summary_full: Tehran's approach appears to rest on a belief it can absorb strikes longer than its adversaries sustain pain and costs, writes BBC Persian's Amir Azimi.
summary_public: Tehran's approach appears to rest on a belief it can absorb strikes longer than its adversaries sustain pain and costs, writes BBC Persian's Amir Azimi.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran's high-risk war strategy seems to centre on endurance and deterrence
